title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, former Twitter CEO, discusses the likely trajectories and market readiness of SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs. The conversation covers differences between the companies, optimal IPO sequencing, capital sources, and whether AI companies represent genuine platform plays.
